response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and demonstrable exposure to agentic workflows and event-driven systems, but lacks clear evidence of executive leadership, fintech infrastructure depth, or production-scale multi-agent AI systems in regulated environments — key requirements for a CTO role in AI-driven fintech.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven track record in event-driven, distributed systems (e.g., GISCollective, DLang microservices)
Strong engineering culture contributions through testing, CI/CD, and open-source tooling
concerns: No explicit evidence of leading engineering teams from 10+ to 30+ people or developing senior technical leadership layers
Lack of demonstrated experience in regulated fintech domains (credit risk, working capital, compliance)
No clear track record of architecting model-agnostic, stateful agent systems with feedback loops for real-time financial decisioning
